site_tagline: All Calculators Online — Math, Finance, Health, Science & More
home_h1: All Calculators Online — Math, Finance, Health, Science & More
site_description: Over 460 free online calculators: math, finance, health, statistics, science, conversions, sports, construction and more. Instant results, no registration.

block_descriptions.estructuras: Free foundation and concrete calculators. Calculate cement, sand, gravel, rebar and formwork for slabs, footings and structural elements.
block_descriptions.mamposteria: Free masonry calculators for bricks, blocks and mortar. Get exact quantities for walls, partitions and enclosures including wastage.
block_descriptions.pavimentos: Free flooring and tiling calculators. Calculate tiles, parquet, adhesive, grout and wastage for any room size and tile format.
block_descriptions.fontaneria: Free plumbing and water calculators. Estimate pipe sizes, water pressure, flow rates and drainage for residential projects.
block_descriptions.electricidad: Free electrical and lighting calculators. Calculate lumens, BTU, circuit loads and wiring for homes and commercial spaces.
block_descriptions.climatizacion: Free HVAC and climate control calculators. Estimate AC capacity, radiator output, insulation R-value and heating loads.
block_descriptions.carpinteria: Free carpentry and metalwork calculators. Calculate doors, windows, stairs, metal sections and structural timber.
block_descriptions.pintura: Free paint and finish calculators. Calculate litres of paint, rolls of wallpaper, plaster and rendering for any surface.
block_descriptions.gestion: Free construction management calculators. Estimate project costs, labour hours, material budgets and renovation timelines.
block_descriptions.matematicas: Free math calculators: percentages, geometry, algebra, rule of three and more. Instant results, no sign-up required.
block_descriptions.finanzas: Free financial calculators: mortgage, loan, compound interest, VAT, net salary, discount and break-even point.
block_descriptions.salud: Free health calculators: BMI, daily calories, ideal weight and water intake. Results based on your weight, height and activity level.
block_descriptions.cotidiano: Everyday life calculators: tip, age, date difference and more. Handy tools for any daily situation.
block_descriptions.estadistica: Free statistics calculators: mean, median, standard deviation, variance, probability and more.
block_descriptions.ciencia: Science and physics calculators: speed, force, energy, pressure, electricity and more.
block_descriptions.conversion: Free unit converters: length, weight, temperature, volume, area, speed and more.
block_descriptions.deportes: Sports calculators: running pace, calories burned, heart rate, VO2 max and more.

error_invalid_math: Cannot calculate — check your inputs (division by zero or out-of-range value).
private_mode_warning: Private browsing — your inputs won't be saved between visits.
consent_required_lead: Accept cookies to receive updates by email.
sensitivity_no_var: Add a second input to see how the result changes.
email_consent: I agree to receive product updates by email.
footer_disclaimer: Results are approximate estimates. Always consult a professional.
tally_empty: No items yet. Calculate something and click "+ Project".
email_desc: Enter your email and download a PDF report with your results.
